page_title: The 10 Best Happy Hours in Dallas Right Now

restaurants.name: The Libertine Bar
restaurants.image_alt: Iced yellow drink with lime and menu on an outdoor table.
restaurants.deal_headline: Half-Price Wine Bottles & $5 Frozen Margs, Tue-Fri
restaurants.blurb: Half-price wine bottles four nights a week, $5 frozen margs, $5 cocktails (Paloma, Old Fashioned, Dark 'n Stormy), plus a Tuesday $20 steak-and-cocktail night. The Lower Greenville bar has been doing real-deal happy hour since 2007 and the value math still doesn't add up anywhere else on the strip.

items: $5 cocktails: Paloma, Old Fashioned, Sangria, Dark 'n Stormy, Carajillo
$20 steak or burger with cocktail (Absolut Martini, TX Old Fashioned, or Altos Paloma)
$10 birria tacos (house-made beef birria, onions, cilantro)
$5 frozen margaritas · $4 champagne drinks · $6 bloody marys

restaurants.name: The Peak Inn
restaurants.image_alt: Close-up: double cheeseburger with melted cheese, fries, and ketchup.
restaurants.deal_headline: $4 PBR & Lone Star, $4.50 Wells, Six Nights a Week
restaurants.blurb: Genuine Deep Ellum dive territory: $4 PBR and Lone Star, $4.50 wells, $4.75 Coors pints, $5 Fireball, $6 Tito's. Six nights a week, 5pm to close (closed Tuesdays). The locals' move when you want a real night out without the Uptown markup.

items: $4 Lone Star, Lone Star Light, PBR
$9.99 cheeseburger + fries with cheap beer pints

restaurants.name: The Standard Pour
restaurants.cuisine: American, Brunch, Hamburger, Bar And Grill, Pub, Bar, Restaurant
restaurants.image_alt: Warm, empty rustic-chic restaurant interior with bar and open patio.
restaurants.deal_headline: $6 Cocktails Daily (Moscow Mule, Old Fashioned, Margarita)
restaurants.blurb: Six different $6 cocktails (Moscow Mule, Old Fashioned, Lucky Mule, Samurai Gimlet, Clover Club, Diablo Margarita) plus $7 Rosé 75 and Spiced Pear Sangria, 5pm to 7pm every day. The most consistent cocktail program on McKinney Ave, and Monday's runs all night.

items: $6 Moscow Mule, Old Fashioned, Lucky Mule, Samurai Gimlet, Clover Club, Diablo Margarita
Same happy hour menu runs all night Mondays

restaurants.name: Sundown at Granada
restaurants.image_alt: Hand pouring orange juice into a flute, making a Mimosa outdoors.
restaurants.blurb: Lower Greenville's prettiest patio runs $5 drafts, $7 craft cocktails, and $2 mimosas all weekday afternoon, then again at weekend brunch. Wednesday is $10 burger night, Thursday is half-price wine night. Live music spills over from the Granada Theater next door more often than not.

items: $10 burger or sandwich + fries with $5 drafts

deals.details:
$5 Drafts
$7 Craft Cocktails
$2 Mimosas

$10 Burgers (And Sandwiches) +Fries
$5 Drafts
1/2 Price Bottles of Wine

$5 Drafts
$7 Craft Cocktails
$2 Mimosas

restaurants.name: Happiest Hour
restaurants.image_alt: Empty modern industrial-chic restaurant with wooden beams, concrete floors, and bar.
restaurants.blurb: The most popular happy hour in Dallas by sheer volume (5,000-plus reviews can't all be wrong). Half-off Happytizers, $7 signature cocktails, $7 wines, and $1 off drafts, Mon through Fri 4 to 6pm. The Uptown rooftop you're already on Instagram looking at.

deals.details:
$1 Off 16 oz Draft Beers
$7 House Wine
$7 Signature Cocktails
1/2 Off Happytizers

restaurants.name: The Nodding Donkey
restaurants.cuisine: Pizza, Sandwich Shop, American, Bar, Restaurant
restaurants.image_alt: Hand with citrus drink in mason jar, blurred bar background.
restaurants.blurb: Uptown sandwich-and-pizza shop with the broadest happy hour program on Thomas Ave. $4 domestic drafts, $5 imports, $6 wells, plus $6.50 brisket queso, jalapeño skins, and donkey balls on the food side. Rotating daily lunch specials and a different liquor deal each weeknight.

items: $6.50 brisket queso, jalapeño skins, wagon wheels, donkey balls
$9.95 daily food special: burger Mon, salads Tue, buffalo chicken Wed, fajitas Thu, chicken strips Fri

restaurants.name: Rodeo Bar
restaurants.image_alt: Hand reaches for sau sauced chicken wings, carrots, celery, burger, and beer.
restaurants.deal_headline: $5 Drafts, $6 Wine & $8 Chili Cheese Fries, Mon-Fri 2-6pm
restaurants.blurb: Downtown country bar with $5 drafts, $5 Highs-and-Lows (Miller High Life plus a Slow & Low shot), $6 wells and wine, $12 Slow Old-Fashioneds, and $8 chili cheese fries. Mon through Fri, 2 to 6pm. The cowboy boots aren't ironic and the High Lifes hit different on the patio.

items: $5 Highs & Lows (Miller High Life with a Slow & Low shot)

restaurants.name: Old Monk Oak Cliff
restaurants.image_alt: Two hands holding Guinness stout pints with creamy white heads.
restaurants.deal_headline: $7 House Cocktails Mon-Fri, $7 Martinis All Day Thursday
restaurants.blurb: $7 house cocktails (Irish Old Fashioned, Espresso Martini, Ancho Chile Margarita) Mon to Fri 3 to 7pm at the Davis Street Irish pub. Thursdays run a $7 martini hour all day (French 75, Cosmo, Espresso Martini). Bishop Arts' most reliable post-work move.

items: Irish Old Fashioned, Espresso Martini, Ancho Chile Margarita, and more
$7 martinis all day: Espresso Martini, French 75, Cosmo, and more

restaurants.name: Harwood Arms
restaurants.image_alt: Loaded potato skins, fries, chicken, and dark beers with chess pieces.
restaurants.blurb: $1 off draft beer, $6 wine, $6 wells, and $7 concoctions (Irish Mule, Whiskey Sour, Arms Spicy Margarita, Old Fashioned, Rosemary Cucumber Gimlet) Mon through Thu 4 to 7pm. Friday opens the deal earlier at 11am. The polished pub in the Harwood District that punches above its arts-row address.

items: $7 concoctions: Irish Mule, Whiskey Sour, Arms Spicy Margarita, Old Fashioned, Rosemary Cucumber Gimlet
Same happy hour menu, all afternoon Friday

restaurants.name: Clifton Club Bar & Lounge
restaurants.image_alt: Bartender pours frothy yellow drinks from golden shaker into glasses.
restaurants.deal_headline: $10 Classic Cocktails & $12 Boozy Old Fashioneds, Tue-Sun 4:30-6:30pm
restaurants.blurb: $10 classic cocktails (Margarita, French 75, Moscow Mule, Daiquiri), $12 Boozy Old Fashioned and Espresso Martini, $14 Bougie Club Martini, plus $7 bar snacks. Six days a week 4:30 to 6:30pm. A proper cocktail lounge on Fitzhugh that takes its drinks seriously.

items: $10 Classic Margarita, French 75, Moscow Mule, Daiquiri
$7 bar snacks: olives, mixed nuts, parmesan truffle fries
